recommendation.sustainableBasis: hyperevm valued at ~90%-util rate not 10.8% spot (on-chain util 91.7% = above target, spike will revert)
constraintsBound: hyperevm thin per MCP so staged
both legs cross-chain: zero fast-liquid/SLA cost

execNote: Verified on-chain at block 25545645: Base 1352042->1202608 (-150k), HyperEVM 880538->1031146 (+150k), vault buffer unchanged at 17205. The unchanged vault confirms the realized SOURCE was Base (matching our recommendation), NOT the vault (which the production rebalancer's delta had specified).

review.note: HyperEVM held ~7-11% (now ~9.05%) vs 9.4% projected; did NOT revert to the 6.6% weekly low. Move net-positive. Confirms valuing at the 90%-util sustainable rate rather than 10.8% spot was correct. Re-review after a longer window to confirm durability.
